originalTitle: Avatar: Seven Havens | Official Teaser | Paramount+ (SDCC 2026)
content: Avatar: Seven Havens premieres October 9 only on Paramount+. Avatar: Seven Havens is an all-new series from creators Michael Dante DiMartino and Bryan Konietzko. Set in a world shattered by a devastating cataclysm, a young Earthbender discovers she's the new Avatar after Korra. In this dangerous era, that title marks her as humanity's destroyer, not its savior. Hunted by both human and spirit enemies, she and her long-lost twin must uncover their mysterious origins and save the Seven Havens before civilization’s last strongholds collapse. Watch More Avatar :arrow_right: https://bit.ly/4vDnUE3 Welcome to the Avatar Legends channel – the ultimate home for all things Avatar! Here you will find the best battles, deep dives, and the most memorable moments from all of your favorite characters from Aang to Zuko. On top of that, there will be plenty of Legend of Korra, official Avatar Comics, and even more exciting original content! You don’t need a sky bison to swing on by to the Avatar: The Last Airbender channel for all our new videos! Subscribe to join Team Avatar and be the first to get notified of exclusive original content you won’t find anywhere else! Plus, you can count on Paramount+ for the most iconic movies and the latest in live sports and news with your local CBS station, CBS News, CBS Sports HQ, and Mixible. #Avatar #SevenHavens #AvatarLegends #ParamountPlus #Avatar #AvatarTheLastAirbender #ATLA Watch More Avatar ➡️ https://bit.ly/4vDnUE3 Welcome to the Avatar: The Last Airbender channel – the ultimate home for all things Avatar! chineseSummary: 阿凡达传奇 · 754,927 次观看
chineseContent: 《阿凡达：七个天堂》将于 10 月 9 日在 Paramount+ 上首映。 《阿凡达：七个避难所》是由创作者迈克尔·丹特·迪马蒂诺和布莱恩·科涅茨科创作的全新系列。故事发生在一个被毁灭性灾难摧毁的世界中，一位年轻的缚地者发现她是继科拉之后的新阿凡达。在这个危险的时代，这个头衔标志着她是人类的毁灭者，而不是人类的救世主。在人类和精神敌人的追捕下，她和她失散已久的双胞胎必须揭开他们的神秘起源，并在文明最后的据点崩溃之前拯救七个避难所。观看更多 阿凡达 :arrow_right: https://bit.ly/4vDnUE3 欢迎来到阿凡达传奇频道 - 阿凡达一切的终极家园！在这里，您将找到从 Aang 到 Zuko 等所有您最喜欢的角色的最佳战斗、深入探索和最难忘的时刻。除此之外，还将有大量《科拉传奇》、官方阿凡达漫画，以及更多精彩的原创内容！您不需要天空野牛来观看我们所有新视频的《阿凡达：最后的气宗》频道！订阅即可加入 Team Avatar，并成为第一个收到在其他地方找不到的独家原创内容的通知！在 Facebook 上关注 Paramount+：https://bit.ly/PPlusFacebook 在 X 上关注 Paramount+：https://bit.ly/PPlusOnX 在 Instagram 上关注 Paramount+：https://bit.ly/PPlusInstagram 在 Threads 上关注 Paramount+：https://bit.ly/PPlusThreads 在 TikTok 上关注 Paramount+：https://bit.ly/PPlusTikTok 通过 Paramount+，您可以观看来自 CBS、BET、Comedy Central、 MTV、Nickelodeon、Smithsonian Channel、Paramount Pictures 和 SHOWTIME® 包括独家原创内容、现场体育赛事和新闻。此外，您还可以通过 Paramount+ 观看当地 CBS 电台最具代表性的电影以及最新的体育赛事和新闻直播
